# `ta.sessionVolumeProfile`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.5

Session Volume Profile — bucketizes the current session's volume
by price, resetting when `bar.time` crosses the active session
boundary.

## Formula

Port of invinite session-vp: find the current session
window, bucket volume by price, then derive POC / value-
area high / value-area low via the shared volume-profile
pipeline.

## Warmup

NaN until a session window has positive volume; missing
`syminfo.session` falls back to UTC-day boundaries.

## Anchors

`syminfo.session` descriptor, or `opts.sessionStart`
override when provided.

## Signature

```ts
function sessionVolumeProfile(slotId: string, opts?: SessionVolumeProfileOpts): SessionVolumeProfileResult;
```

_The leading `slotId: string` parameter is injected by the chartlang compiler at every callsite — script authors call `ta.<id>(...)` without it._

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `slotId` | `string` | — | — |
| `opts` | `SessionVolumeProfileOpts` | (optional) | — |

## Returns

`SessionVolumeProfileResult`

## Example

```ts
// import { plot, ta } from "@invinite-org/chartlang-core";
    // const vp = ta.sessionVolumeProfile({ rowSize: 24 });
    // plot(vp.poc, { style: { kind: "horizontal-histogram", buckets: vp.buckets } });
```
